title: codereview: Builder error swallowed in scheduler
description: rust/lichen-node/src/scheduler.rs:247 maps all AnnounceError to BufferTooSmall, losing InvalidChannel distinction. Update error mapping for robustness. codereview P2
close_reason: Standardized rx_channel naming in all impls per dp4j; updated scheduler error mapping to preserve InvalidChannel; fixed signed_data inclusion and validation to 0-15; updated tests/vectors/spec/docs; cargo clippy/test passed 3x with no weakenings; 3 codereview passes converged with no P0-P2 findings.
